should_trigger.prompt: Use Optimize Prompt on this Italian VAT question and turn it into a Deep Research prompt with official sources and citations.
Ottimizza questo quesito fiscale per Deep Research, mantenendo tutti i fatti e chiedendo fonti ufficiali.
Create a defensible compliance Deep Research prompt from this cross-border case, including citations and residual uncertainty.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Improve this marketing headline for my website.
Tell me the answer to this tax question and calculate what I owe.
Reconcile this accounting journal to the bank statement.
